assertions.title: Stream content color coding

steps.action: Open /WEA/dashboard and inspect expanded executive cards
steps.expected: Expanded card includes stream rows where reasoning/tool call/tool result/error text can be color-audited
steps.observed: Expanded cards were present (Active Executive and Error Executive) but contained only header + metadata rows (role/adapter); no stream transcript rows were rendered.

steps.action: Run DOM/computed-style audit for stream content types (reasoning, tool calls, tool results, errors)
steps.expected: Reasoning text uses --fg-muted, tool calls use --warn and are $-prefixed, tool results use --fg-dim with indentation, and error text uses --dead
steps.observed: Audit returned zero matching elements for reasoning/tool/result/error/stream selectors in dashboard cards. Only one $-prefixed text node existed ($0.00 cost metric), not a tool-call row.

steps.action: Capture screenshots and inspect JS-computed design tokens
steps.expected: Visual evidence plus computed color values for transcript line types
steps.observed: Screenshots captured successfully; root token values resolved as --fg-muted=rgba(255,255,255,0.68), --warn=#E8D560, --fg-dim=rgba(255,255,255,0.40), --dead=#FF6060, but no dashboard stream elements consumed these tokens.

evidence.network: agent-browser network requests --filter /api/ returned no captured requests

assertions.issues: Blocked by missing stream transcript content in expanded dashboard agent blocks; required reasoning/tool/result/error color checks were not executable on the real UI surface.

frictions.description: agent-browser ref click on dashboard row (`@e40`) produced a multi-match selector error.
frictions.resolution: Used a scoped in-page eval click on the main-dashboard row containing "Error Executive" to expand the card for inspection.

frictions.description: agent-browser network history returned no request entries during this flow.
frictions.resolution: Used screenshots plus DOM/computed-style audits as primary evidence, per flow guidance preference.

summary: Tested 1 assertion: 0 passed, 0 failed, 1 blocked (VAL-GUI-DASH-007) because expanded dashboard agent blocks did not render stream transcript elements needed for color-coding verification.
